system.description: The Explorer may use analytical circuits to calculate trajectory and reactions to a preternatural extent. By using his Reaction for the Round, the character may make a Tech-Use Test to make use of this Talent.
system.benefit: By using his Reaction for the Round, the Explorer may make a Tech-Use Test. On a success, he gains a +10 bonus to all Weapon Skill and Ballistic Skill Tests until the end of his next Turn. He must pass a Toughness Test when he uses this ability or gain a level of Fatigue.

rollConfig.description: Spend your Reaction to make a Tech-Use Test and engage the implant's combat calculations.

characteristics.condition: Until the end of your next Turn after a successful Tech-Use Test made by spending your Reaction
Until the end of your next Turn after a successful Tech-Use Test made by spending your Reaction
